'''Tesslar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] working for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] orphan, Tesslar made a living during his adolescence as a member of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Shamel]]'s gang. Stealing [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] for the gang throughout his youth, Tesslar eventually learned how to fire a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and cut ties with Shamel and ventured into the wider [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. Becoming a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], Tesslar quickly found work with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], detesting any hunter aligned with a guild or working independently.<ref name="GG10" />
